calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-17-2022 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-15-2022 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Apr-13-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Colin Kelley, via Zoom, for Nancy Valente, Petitioner.

The court points to the Accounting Petition filed with the court. The court advises counsel of its confusion regarding why the community property had not been listed in the Inventory and Appraisal ("I&A"). Counsel offers oral testimony regarding his reasons for not doing so and the court reminds counsel that it is either community property or it is not and points counsel to CA Evidence Code Section 662. The court advises counsel that it is inclined to confirm the community property interest and deny the remaining relief requested. Counsel advises that he is comfortable with the court's tentative ruling. The court confirms with counsel that he should file an updated I&A and consider filing an amended Accounting Petition.

The Petition for Spousal Property is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Gomez. Not reported.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Mar-15-2022 Continued To Apr-06-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Feb-15-2022 Continued To Mar-15-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-03-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections and the petition being duly noticed, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated January 21, 2010 is admitted to probate. Nancy K. Valente is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for August 17, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Lee. Not reported.
